blocks.content: They stopped at her front walk.
The summer was already here — the thick heat, the gardenias, the five-o'clock light. He'd stood at this spot more times than he could count.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You okay this summer? You seemed — I don't know. Somewhere else this year.
A beat. The gardenias. A car going slow down the street.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I'm good. I promise. Just a long year.
She held his gaze for one moment and then nodded and took her bike up the walk.
He watched her go inside. Stood in the warm afternoon.
